title: Dead/broken get_db_path helper in app.py
evidence: app.py:15-17 defines get_db_path() with a nonsensical expression (app.config.get('DATABASE_PATH','models').__self__); it is never called and would raise AttributeError if the guarded branch were ever taken
suggestion: Delete the unused app.py get_db_path/_get_real_db_path/_get_db_path scaffolding; models.get_db_path is the real one used by tests

title: Agent file-mutation verifier flagged models.py as unmodified this turn
evidence: _agent_stdout.log:26-27 warns models.py was NOT written; however the nested-connection fix (inline conn.execute in create_book models.py:92 and update_book models.py:183) is present and tests pass
suggestion: No action — fix is present in the archived file; note is informational for cross-run comparison
